description: Fix project and agent registration fragmentation so remote agents get session files, projects auto-register, and inbox resolution works

specs.description: hex agent connect writes a session file on the client host
specs.given: A remote host running hex agent connect http://nexus:5555
specs.when: The connect succeeds and returns an agent ID
specs.then: A session file is written to ~/.hex/sessions/agent-{session_id}.json containing agentId, name, project, registeredAt

specs.description: hex agent connect sends project_dir and session_id to nexus
specs.when: hex agent connect http://nexus:5555 is called
specs.then: The POST body includes project_dir (CWD) and a generated session_id; the server resolves and returns project_id
Returns the agentId from agent-abc123.json, ignoring newer session files

specs.description: resolve_agent_id uses HEX_AGENT_ID when CLAUDE_SESSION_ID is absent
specs.then: Returns '9f94a059-...' directly without reading session files

specs.given: Two session files: agent-nexus-123.json (newest, name='nexus-agent-*') and agent-456.json (older, name='claude-*')
specs.when: resolve_agent_id() falls back to newest-file scan
specs.then: Returns agentId from agent-456.json, skipping the nexus file

specs.description: hex inbox list works on remote host after hex agent connect
specs.given: Remote agent connected via hex agent connect, session file written
specs.when: hex inbox list is called on the remote host
specs.then: Resolves the correct agent ID and queries the inbox successfully

specs.description: Server returns project_id in connect response
specs.then: Response includes projectId field (auto-registered if needed)

specs.description: resolve_agent_id returns clear error when no session exists
specs.given: No session files exist, no env vars set
specs.then: Returns error 'Cannot resolve agent ID' with hint to run hex agent connect
